features: Rebuilt Client Patrol Requests form into command-center layout matching the developer mockup
Added Request Type dropdown in the form synced with the request type cards
Converted Priority to a segmented Normal / High / Emergency control
Reorganized the form into clean rows: property/type/priority, schedule, instructions/services, upload/submit
Requested Services are now aligned service cards with icons
Reference Photo/Video remains device-upload only with no URL entry
Upload preview supports photo/video file name display
Request Summary rail includes service icons and clearer request context
Request History table remains below the form
